mapper.select:
SELECT dcl.check_id, dcl.check_no, DATE_FORMAT(dcl.check_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS check_date, dcl.check_title, dcl.checklist_id, dc.checklist_name, dcl.site_cd, si.site_name, dcl.writer_id, au.user_nm AS writer_nm, dcl.status_cd, dcl.weather_cd, dcl.remark, DATE_FORMAT(dcl.reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS reg_dt, DATE_FORMAT(dcl.upd_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS upd_dt FROM daily_check_log dcl LEFT JOIN daily_checklist dc ON dc.checklist_id = dcl.checklist_id LEFT JOIN site_info si ON si.site_cd = dcl.site_cd AND si.del_yn = 'N' LEFT JOIN admin_user au ON au.user_id = dcl.writer_id AND au.use_yn = 1 WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY dcl.check_date DESC, dcl.check_id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM daily_check_log dcl LEFT JOIN daily_checklist dc ON dc.checklist_id = dcl.checklist_id LEFT JOIN admin_user au ON au.user_id = dcl.writer_id AND au.use_yn = 1 WHERE 1 = 1

sql.if: AND ( dcl.check_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR dcl.check_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR dc.checklist_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR au.user_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR dcl.writer_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select: SELECT dcl.check_id, dcl.check_no, DATE_FORMAT(dcl.check_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS check_date, dcl.check_title, dcl.checklist_id, dc.checklist_name, dcl.site_cd, si.site_name, dcl.writer_id, au.user_nm AS writer_nm, dcl.status_cd, dcl.weather_cd, dcl.remark, DATE_FORMAT(dcl.reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS reg_dt, DATE_FORMAT(dcl.upd_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS upd_dt FROM daily_check_log dcl LEFT JOIN daily_checklist dc ON dc.checklist_id = dcl.checklist_id LEFT JOIN site_info si ON si.site_cd = dcl.site_cd AND si.del_yn = 'N' LEFT JOIN admin_user au ON au.user_id = dcl.writer_id AND au.use_yn = 1 WHERE dcl.check_id = #{checkId}

SELECT log_item_id, check_id, item_id, item_name, input_type, required_yn, check_value, check_memo, sort_ord FROM daily_check_log_item WHERE check_id = #{checkId} ORDER BY sort_ord ASC, log_item_id ASC
SELECT CONCAT('DC', #{ymd}, LPAD(IFNULL(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(check_no, 11) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1, 4, '0')) FROM daily_check_log WHERE check_no LIKE CONCAT('DC', #{ymd}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_check_log ( check_no, check_date, check_title, checklist_id, site_cd, writer_id, status_cd, weather_cd, remark, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{checkNo}, #{checkDate}, #{checkTitle}, #{checklistId}, #{siteCd}, #{writerId}, #{statusCd}, #{weatherCd}, #{remark}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO daily_check_log_item ( check_id, item_id, item_name, input_type, required_yn, check_value, check_memo, sort_ord ) VALUES ( #{checkId}, #{itemId}, #{itemName}, #{inputType}, #{requiredYn}, #{checkValue}, #{checkMemo}, #{sortOrd} )
